title: Long Term Yields Come With Risks
section_path: Long Term Yields Come With Risks
section_path_text: Long Term Yields Come With Risks
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The resurgence of the Middle East conflict is likely to affect the possible Saudi-Israel deal which had been pushing oil prices down. Inflation may be pressured higher, due to a stronger-than-expected economy and a possible new wave of high energy prices. For the past few weeks, the yield curve has been dis-inverting, i.e.
